retry_reason: A put operation either succeeds (refcount decremented, possibly freeing) or indicates a double-free if refcount already zero; retrying would risk use-after-free.
contract_summary: Decrement the reference count of a batadv_orig_node via kref_put. If the pointer is non-NULL, it decrements the refcount; when the refcount reaches zero, the batadv_orig_node_release callback is invoked to free the object. After calling this function, the caller must not access the orig_node pointer again, as it may have been freed. This is a standard put wrapper for reference-counted objects in the batman-adv subsystem.

judge.reason: The sole purpose is to release a reference on an batadv_orig_node by kref_put, with only a NULL check and no other business logic.
